prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为约407→376→484→617→792名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约385名，2025年基准位次约792名；2021 –2025年该校在重庆物理类招生计划均为8人，2026年计划增至11人，扩招约37.5%，竞争有所加剧，位次预期后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985、211、双一流高校， 软科中国大学主榜排名第3（2026年），浙江大学医学院共享浙江大学顶尖平台，属全国最高层次医学院之一；2026年浙江大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不 端、校园安全等事件；但抖音热度排名第14位（高热），短视频平台曝光度极高，报考关注度不减。历史投档异常方面，2021–2025年均未见浙江大学医学院在重庆有明显断档记 录；浙江大学临床医学学科评估A、基础医学A-、药学A+，均为顶尖水平；招生专业临床医学（5+3一体化）、医学试验班类（含临床医学、口腔医学）均对应A 级学科，学科竞争力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业2024年热度评估为推荐（偏热），2025年升至高热推荐，医学类专业报考持续升温；重庆物理类考生2021年9895 4人→2025年139478人持续增长，2026年总考生209000人，按近年物理类占比约65%估算物理类约135850人，较2025年略有下降，竞争压力略有缓解；浙江大学医学院位于浙江杭州，非重庆本地院校，在重庆招生占比约4%（2025年），无显著地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、20 26年扩招约37.5%导致竞争加剧、医学专业热度持续高热、浙大品牌效应强劲、重庆物理类考生总数略降等因素，在2025年基准792名基础上，扩招为主要后移驱动力，但医学热度 和品牌效应形成一定支撑；预测最低位次约950名，区间836–1064名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 浙江大学医学院在重庆物理类招生专业少、层次高，位次在预测区间（836–1064名）内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限可重点冲击临床医学（5+3一体化）；位次接近区间上限可考虑医学试验班类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 407 → 376 → 484 → 617 → 792, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative shift of about 385 places in the last 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 792. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 8 students each year, and in 2026 it will increase to 11 students, an expansion of about 37.5%, intensifying competition and expected to push rankings further back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 3rd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking. Zhejiang University School of Medicine shares the top-tier platform of Zhejiang University and is one of the highest-level medical schools in the country. In 2026, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct, campus safety incidents, etc. However, its Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high application attention. Historically, there have been no obvious enrollment gaps for Zhejiang University School of Medicine in Chongqing from 2021 to 2025. Zhejiang University's clinical medicine discipline is rated A, basic medicine A-, pharmacy A+, all at top levels. The enrollment majors, Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and Medical Experimental Class (including Clinical Medicine and Stomatology), correspond to A-level disciplines, with extremely strong disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Clinical Medicine in 2024 was assessed as recommended (somewhat hot), rising to highly recommended in 2025, with medical majors continuing to heat up. The number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing grew from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, and in 2026 the total number of candidates is 209,000. Estimating about 65% as Physics Category, it is about 135,850, a slight decrease from 2025, easing competition pressure slightly. Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, not a local institution in Chongqing, with an enrollment share of about 4% in Chongqing (2025), with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the expansion of about 37.5% in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the sustained high popularity of medical majors, the strong brand effect of Zhejiang University, and the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing, the expansion is the main driver for the backward shift, but medical popularity and brand effect provide some support. The predicted minimum ranking is about 950, with a range of 836–1064.

Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Medical Experimental Class (including Clinical Medicine, Stomatology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Zhejiang University School of Medicine has few majors and high levels in Chongqing Physics Category. Within the predicted ranking range (836–1064), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 and use Tier 1 as a reach. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit, focus on Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program). If the ranking is close to the upper limit, consider the Medical Experimental Class.
